title: Migration Eval Trial Result
description: Schema for per-trial result.json files emitted by the migration eval framework. See docs/migration_eval/README.md and docs/PRD.md for context.

agent_runner.description: Optional agent runner / harness identifier, distinct from the underlying model. Examples: 'claude_code', 'amp', 'cursor', 'aider', 'custom'. Null or missing means the runner is unspecified — slice metrics by agent_model only.

iterator_id.description: Optional batch identifier for trials produced by a single fan-out workflow. Production fan-out workflows often iterate over hundreds-to-thousands of repos as a single 'iterator' instance; iterator_id ties trials back to that batch so completion / latency / cost can be aggregated per batch. Null when the trial is standalone.

started_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp marking when the trial started executing. Enables p50/p95 latency aggregation in iterator-batch reports.

finished_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp marking when the trial finished executing.

migration_id.description: Migration identifier. Either a stable hand-authored recipe id (e.g. 'java8_17', 'python2_3') OR the first 12 hex chars of the prompt_sha when the migration is prompt-defined.

success.description: True iff the trial passed the reported oracle tier.

failure_class.description: PRD M6 four-way failure discrimination; null when success=true.

oracle_tier.description: PRD M1 tiered oracle funnel stage that produced the pass/fail signal. 'diff_valid' is Tier-0 (cheap syntactic / patch-application check).

oracle_spec_sha.description: SHA of the oracle spec in force when this trial was scored (PRD M8-lite).

recipe_spec_sha.description: SHA of the migration recipe spec in force for this trial (PRD M8-lite).

pre_reg_sha.description: SHA of the pre-registered hypotheses_and_thresholds.md file (PRD M8-lite).

prompt_sha.description: Optional SHA of the agent prompt file when the migration is prompt-defined rather than recipe-defined. Enforced by the publication gate when manifest.json declares a 'prompt_spec' key (PRD M8-lite extension).

score_pre_cutoff.description: PRD M7 contamination-split score for repos created BEFORE the model training cutoff.

score_post_cutoff.description: PRD M7 contamination-split score for repos created AFTER the model training cutoff.
